title: (Unofficial) Mandala's GUI - Dark Mode Mod Compatibility
description: Unofficial Custom Mandala's GUI - Dark Mode Mod Compatibility
body:
## Unofficial Custom Mandala's GUI - Dark Mode Mod Compatibility Resource Pack. Made to have compatibility with mods that i like to use. (Work in Progress) ## 

Compatible Mods:
- ACCESSORIES
- AETHER
- AETHER PROTECT YOUR MOA
- APOTHIC ATTRIBUTES
- ATTRIBUTES LIB
- BACKPACKED
- BARTERING STATION
- BETTER END
- BLUE SKIES
- BOSS TITLES
- CORPSE
- COSMETIC ARMOR REWORKED
- CURIOS
- DAILY SHOP
- EMI
- FARMER'S DELIGHT
- INMIS
- INVENTORY MANAGEMENT
- INVENTORY TWEAKS REFOXED
- IRON FURNACES
- MYTHIC CHARMS
- POLYMORPH
- SAWMILL
- SKY GUIS
- SOPHISTICATED CORE
- SUPPLEMENTARIES (TRINKETS)
- TOM'S SIMPLE STORAGE
- TOM'S TRADING NETWORK
- TRASH SLOT
- TRINKETS
